headline: Diamondback Energy (FANG) Joins Russell Defensive Indexes And Lands In Value Screens
summary: Diamondback Energy (NasdaqGS:FANG) has been added to the Russell 1000 Value Defensive Index. The company has also been included in the Russell 1000 Defensive Index. These index changes highlight Diamondback Energy's role in value oriented and defensive equity baskets. Diamondback Energy is a U.S. oil and gas producer focused on the Permian Basin, a core region for domestic shale output. Its inclusion in the Russell 1000 Value Defensive and Defensive Indexes places the stock alongside...
